programs.name: pinocchio
programs.adaptation: Native SDK: AccountView, Address, ProgramResult, entrypoint

programs.name: pinocchio-system
programs.adaptation: System CPI helper surface for account creation, SOL movement, and PDA state

programs.name: pinocchio-token
programs.adaptation: SPL-compatible token CPI helper surface for p-token/SPL fallback flows

programs.name: pinocchio-associated-token-account
programs.adaptation: ATA creation and validation for launch, vault, escrow, and agent flows

programs.name: pinocchio-memo
programs.adaptation: Reserved for launch annotations and trace markers
